title: Plugin System Gap Remediation — Surface Activation, Runtime Wiring, and Readiness
Activate Memory Plugin Surface — Register node types and extraction strategies
Activate Broadcast Events — Wire plugin-to-plugin custom event channels
Implement Plugin Sandboxing — Add permission model for plugin capabilities
Activate Inter-plugin APIs — Implement expose/get pattern between plugins
Implement Versioned Plugin API Contract — Prevent silent breakage across SDK updates
Implement IdentityProvider — Ship first auth/identity plugin
Activate Hook System — Wire first consumers for all 12 hooks
Activate UI Extensions — Wire unused widget, theme, tool display, and message renderer surfaces
Activate Communication Provider Surface — Export, bootstrap, and ship first Twilio/ElevenLabs consumers
Add Plugin Readiness Matrix, Migration Guide, and End-to-End Verification
Activate Board Item Types — Migrate hardcoded types to plugin registration
Activate Governance Predicates — Register plugin-contributed policy rules
Activate Alert Rule Types — Register plugin-contributed alert evaluators
Implement Dynamic Plugin Discovery — Load plugins from config/directory instead of hardcoded registration
Activate MCP Tool Registration — Ship first plugin-registered tools
Plugin Loading & Bootstrap: Remove hardcoded plugin registration
project: Generic Corp - The Agent Native Corporation
